posts.author: JDAY (Jared Yousif)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Monday Community,

I am using this board as a task tracker for creating the budget for each of our commercial properties. When a subitem is marked complete, it needs to notify the assigned to in the next subitem letting them know they can start their task. There are two task status columns because some of the subitems require two people to complete.

Any ideas on how to make this work? Do I need to restructure?

Thanks,
JY
